contentBlocks.original: ॐ श्री गुरुभ्यो नमः । हरिः ओम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ōṃ śrī gurubhyō namaḥ । hariḥ ōm ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Om. Salutations to the revered Guru. Hari Om.

contentBlocks.original: ओ-ङ्ग॒णाना᳚-न्त्वा ग॒णप॑तिग्ं हवामहे क॒वि-ङ्क॑वी॒नां उप॒मश्र॑वस्तवम् । ज्ये॒ष्ठ॒राज॒-म्ब्रह्म॑णा-म्ब्रह्मणस्पत॒ आ नः॑ शृ॒ण्वन्नू॒तिभि॑स्सीद॒ साद॑नम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ō-ṅga̠ṇānā̎-ntvā ga̠ṇapa̍tigṃ havāmahē ka̠vi-ṅka̍vī̠nāṃ upa̠maśra̍vastavam । jyē̠ṣṭha̠rāja̠-mbrahma̍ṇā-mbrahmaṇaspata̠ ā na̍-śśṛ̠ṇvannū̠tibhi̍ssīda̠ sāda̍nam ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O Ganapati, lord of all ganas, we invoke you — wisest among the wise, most celebrated, eldest sovereign of sacred speech (Brahmanaspati). Come, hear us with your blessings and take your seat among us.

contentBlocks.original: ग॒णाना᳚-न्त्वा त्वा ग॒णाना᳚-ङ्ग॒णाना᳚-न्त्वा ग॒णप॑ति-ङ्ग॒णप॑ति-न्त्वा ग॒णाना᳚-ङ्ग॒णाना᳚-न्त्वा ग॒णप॑तिम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ga̠ṇānā̎-ntvā tvā ga̠ṇānā̎-ṅga̠ṇānā̎-ntvā ga̠ṇapa̍ti-ṅga̠ṇapa̍ti-ntvā ga̠ṇānā̎-ṅga̠ṇānā̎-ntvā ga̠ṇapa̍tim ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha recitation of the Ganapati mantra — the syllables are interwoven in the ancient forward-backward-forward pattern: O lord of ganas, take your seat.

contentBlocks.original: त्वा॒ ग॒णप॑ति-ङ्ग॒णप॑ति-न्त्वात्वा ग॒णप॑तिग्ं हवामहे हवामहे ग॒णप॑ति-न्त्वात्वा गणप॑तिग्ं हवामहे । ग॒णप॑तिग्ं हवामहे हवामहे ग॒णप॑ति-ङ्ग॒णप॑तिग्ं हवामहे क॒विन्क॒विग्ं ह॑वामहे ग॒णप॑ति-ङ्ग॒णप॑तिग्ं हवामहे क॒विम् । ग॒णप॑ति॒मिति॑ग॒ण-प॒ति॒म् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: tvā̠ ga̠ṇapa̍ti-ṅga̠ṇapa̍ti-ntvātvā ga̠ṇapa̍tigṃ havāmahē havāmahē ga̠ṇapa̍ti-ntvātvā gaṇapa̍tigṃ havāmahē । ga̠ṇapa̍tigṃ havāmahē havāmahē ga̠ṇapa̍ti-ṅga̠ṇapa̍tigṃ havāmahē ka̠vinka̠vigṃ ha̍vāmahē ga̠ṇapa̍ti-ṅga̠ṇapa̍tigṃ havāmahē ka̠vim । ga̠ṇapa̍ti̠miti̍ga̠ṇa-pa̠ti̠m ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: We invoke you, O lord of ganas — again and again we call upon you, O Ganapati; again and again we invoke the wisest of the wise.

contentBlocks.original: ह॒वा॒म॒हे॒ क॒वि-ङ्क॒विग्ं॒ ह॑वामहे हवामहे क॒वि-ङ्क॑वी॒नान्क॑वी॒ना-ङ्क॒विग्ं॒ ह॑वामहे हवामहे क॒विन्क॑वी॒नाम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ha̠vā̠ma̠hē̠ ka̠vi-ṅka̠vig̠ṃ ha̍vāmahē havāmahē ka̠vi-ṅka̍vī̠nānka̍vī̠nā-ṅka̠vig̠ṃ ha̍vāmahē havāmahē ka̠vinka̍vī̠nām ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: We invoke you, O wisest among the wise — again and again we call the most wise, we invoke the supremely wise.
Ghana-patha: Among the wise, most celebrated, supremely celebrated — hear us, O wisest one; supremely glorious, most celebrated.

contentBlocks.original: क॒वी॒नामु॑प॒मश्र॑व स्तममुप॒मश्र॑वस्तम-ङ्कवी॒ना न्क॑वी॒ना मु॑प॒मश्र॑वस्तमम् । उ॒प॒मश्र॑वस्तम॒ मित्यु॑प॒मश्र॑वः-त॒म॒म् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ka̠vī̠nāmu̍pa̠maśra̍va stamamupa̠maśra̍vastama-ṅkavī̠nā nka̍vī̠nā mu̍pa̠maśra̍vastamam । u̠pa̠maśra̍vastama̠ mityu̍pa̠maśra̍vaḥ-ta̠ma̠m ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: The most celebrated, the supremely glorious — hear us with your divine protection, O most celebrated lord.

contentBlocks.original: ज्ये॒ष्ट॒राजं॒ ब्रह्म॑णा॒-म्ब्रह्म॑णा-ञ्ज्येष्ठ॒राजं॑ ज्येष्ठ॒राजं॒ ब्रह्म॑णा-म्ब्रह्मणो ब्रह्मणो॒ ब्रह्म॑णा-ञ्ज्येष्ठ॒राजं॑ ज्येष्ठ॒राजं॒ ब्रह्म॑णा-म्ब्रह्मणः । ज्ये॒ष्ठ॒राज॒मिति॑ज्येष्ठ राजम्᳚ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: jyē̠ṣṭa̠rājaṃ̠ brahma̍ṇā̠-mbrahma̍ṇā-ñjyēṣṭha̠rājaṃ̍ jyēṣṭha̠rājaṃ̠ brahma̍ṇā-mbrahmaṇō brahmaṇō̠ brahma̍ṇā-ñjyēṣṭha̠rājaṃ̍ jyēṣṭha̠rājaṃ̠ brahma̍ṇā-mbrahmaṇaḥ । jyē̠ṣṭha̠rāja̠miti̍jyēṣṭha rājam̎ ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: O eldest sovereign of sacred speech (jyeshtharaja of Brahmanaspati) — lord of prayers, lord of sacred utterances.

contentBlocks.original: ब्रह्म॑णा-म्ब्रह्मणो ब्रह्मणो॒ ब्रह्म॑णां॒ ब्रह्म॑णा-म्ब्रह्मणस्पते पतेब्रह्मणो॒ ब्रह्म॑णां॒ ब्रह्म॑णा-म्ब्रह्मणस्पते ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: brahma̍ṇā-mbrahmaṇō brahmaṇō̠ brahma̍ṇāṃ̠ brahma̍ṇā-mbrahmaṇaspatē patēbrahmaṇō̠ brahma̍ṇāṃ̠ brahma̍ṇā-mbrahmaṇaspatē ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: O lord of sacred speech, Brahmanaspati, lord of Brahman — hear us, O master of the sacred.

contentBlocks.original: ब्र॒ह्म॒ण॒स्प॒ते॒ प॒ते॒ ब्र॒ह्म॒णो॒ ब्र॒ह्म॒ण॒स्प॒त॒ आप॑ते ब्रह्मणो ब्रह्मणस्पत॒ आ । प॒त॒ आ प॑तेपत॒ आनो॑न॒ आप॑ते पत॒ आनः॑ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: bra̠hma̠ṇa̠spa̠tē̠ pa̠tē̠ bra̠hma̠ṇō̠ bra̠hma̠ṇa̠spa̠ta̠ āpa̍tē brahmaṇō brahmaṇaspata̠ ā । pa̠ta̠ ā pa̍tēpata̠ ānō̍na̠ āpa̍tē pata̠ āna̍ḥ ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: O Brahmanaspati, lord, come to us — lord of sacred knowledge, lord of Brahman, hear our call.

contentBlocks.original: आनो॑न॒ आन॑श्शृ॒ण्वन्छृ॒ण्वन्न॒ आन॑श्शृण्वन्न् । न॒ श्शृण्वन्छृ॒ण्वन्नो॑न श्शृ॒ण्वन्नू॒तिभि॑ रू॒तिभि॑श्शृ॒ण्वन्नो॑न श्शृ॒ण्वन्नू॒तिभिः॑ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ānō̍na̠ āna̍śśṛ̠ṇvanChṛ̠ṇvanna̠ āna̍śśṛṇvann । na̠ śśṛṇvanChṛ̠ṇvannō̍na śśṛ̠ṇvannū̠tibhi̍ rū̠tibhi̍śśṛ̠ṇvannō̍na śśṛ̠ṇvannū̠tibhi̍ḥ ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: Hear us, hear us with your divine blessings (utibhih) — with your protecting grace, please hear and protect.
Ghana-patha: With your blessings (utibhih), come and take your seat (sida) — come sit among us, protected by your grace.

contentBlocks.original: ऊ॒तिभि॑स्सीद सीदो॒तिभि॑ रू॒तिभि॑स्सीद॒ साद॑न॒ग्ं॒ साद॑नग्ं॒ सीदो॒तिभि॑रू॒तिभि॑स्सीद॒ साद॑नम् । ऊ॒तिभि॒ रित्यू॒ति-भिः॒ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: ū̠tibhi̍ssīda sīdō̠tibhi̍ rū̠tibhi̍ssīda̠ sāda̍na̠g̠ṃ sāda̍nag̠ṃ sīdō̠tibhi̍rū̠tibhi̍ssīda̠ sāda̍nam । ū̠tibhi̠ rityū̠ti-bhi̠ḥ ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: Come and be seated (utibhih sida) — with your blessings take your place (sadanam), sit with us.

contentBlocks.original: सी॒द॒साद॑न॒ग्ं॒ साद॑नग्ं॒ सीद सीद॒ साद॑नम् । साद॑न॒मिति॒ साद॑नम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration: sī̠da̠sāda̍na̠g̠ṃ sāda̍nag̠ṃ sīda sīda̠ sāda̍nam । sāda̍na̠miti̠ sāda̍nam ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Ghana-patha: Come and take your seat (sida sadanam) — be seated, be seated among us, O lord; thus take your seat.
Om. Salutations to the great Ganapati.
